confidence_comprehension_gap: The patient correctly grasped the central physiological concept—that a regulatory signal is elevated while actual thyroid hormones remain normal—yet expressed significant uncertainty ('I might have it backwards'), demonstrating accurate conceptual comprehension undermined by low confidence due to overwhelming medical terminology.
